mission.title: grpc: (mach-o file, but is an incompatible architecture (have 'x86_64', need 'arm64e')) on apple M1 chip
mission.description: (mach-o file, but is an incompatible architecture (have 'x86_64', need 'arm64e')) on apple M1 chip. This issue affects 16+ users.

steps.title: Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your grpc setup:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
`dlopen(/Users/vikram/.rbenv/versions/2.6.5/lib/ruby/gems/2.6.0/gems/grpc-1.38.0-universal-darwin/src/ruby/lib/grpc/2.6/grpc_c.bundle, 0x0009): tried:

steps.title: Apply the fix for (mach-o file, but is an incompatible architecture (have…
steps.description:
Custom strip invalidates the signature, caused the arm64-darwin gem failed to run on M1 macs.
Error in mac console: `Exception Type:        EXC_BAD_ACCESS (SIGKILL (Code Signature Invalid))`

Warning in gem build log:
```
# linking shared-object grpc/grpc_c.bundle
# Stripping grpc_c.bundle
#
```yaml
# linking shared-object grpc/grpc_c.bundle
# Stripping grpc_c.bundle
# /opt/osxcross/target/bin/aarch64-apple-darwin20.2-strip: warning: changes being made to the file will invalidate the code signature in: /Users/jeff/work/ruby/grpc/tmp/arm64-darwin/grpc_c/3.2.0/grpc_c.bundle
```

steps.title: Confirm (mach-o file, but is an incompatible architecture… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Custom strip invalidates the signature, caused the arm64-darwin gem failed to run on M1 macs.
codeSnippets:
# linking shared-object grpc/grpc_c.bundle
# Stripping grpc_c.bundle
# /opt/osxcross/target/bin/aarch64-apple-darwin20.2-strip: warning: changes being made to the file will invalidate the code signature in: /Users/jeff/work/ruby/grpc/tmp/arm64-darwin/grpc_c/3.2.0/grpc_c.bundle

prerequisites.description: gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
